item.title: Mel Brooks didn't warn Steve Weber about how much blood was going to erupt in this scene from "Dracula: Dead and Loving It" (1995)
item.description: This is the first take of it too, you can see Weber struggling not to laugh and break the scene.

item.title: Take The Oil Said Trump At 9AM. We Have Your Pilot Said Iran At 3PM. The Same Day. April 3 2026.
item.description: Iran shot down a US F-15E Strike Eagle. The pilot didn't eject safely. Iran claims they have the crew. The US scrambled a rescue operation. A Black Hawk was shot down during the rescue attempt. Multiple aircraft lost in a single operation. The US is publicly denying ALL OF IT. ??✈️ This morning Trump said "take the oil and make a fortune." This afternoon Iran announced they have an American prisoner of war. THE SAME DAY. March 31 he was willing to end the war. April 3 he said take the oil. April 3 an American pilot was captured on Iranian soil. THE SAME FUCKING DAY. ?️⚰️? The last time Iran held Americans hostage was 1979. 444 days. It destroyed Carter's entire presidency. A POW is not just a tragedy. A POW is leverage. Iran now holds a card nobody can take from them. And if that pilot appears on Iranian state television the political fallout will be unlike anything we've seen. ??? Over 100 legal experts called the strikes potential war crimes today. A US servicemember is now in Iranian custody. The Army Chief of Staff was fired this morning. The rescue helicopter was shot down. The US is denying everything. This is not a footnote. This is the fucking story. ????️ #F15E #AmericanPOW #IranWar #ShotDown #BlackHawkDown #TakeTheOil #444Days #WarCrimes #ThisIsTheStory #GodHelpThePilot
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: Mini dump of 15 vids Friday Fun
item.description:
Some old, some new, some borrowed, some blue.
I hope you enjoy your Friday and the ups and downs that may come of your weekend. Be safe in your travels and find some time to enjoy for those of us working!
item.dc:creator: UraniumMan

item.title: GovBrief Today #427
item.description: Donald Trump's criminal defense attorney is now running the Justice Department, and his first act was to kill the law his client was charged under. Todd Blanche defended Trump through two federal prosecutions, including the classified documents case built on the Presidential Records Act. Trump announced today that he had fired Attorney General Pam Bondi, and Blanche, the man who sat next to him when the charges were read, stepped into her role. Trump ally and FBI director Kash Patel spent the winter firing every FBI agent who touched that investigation. The prosecutors who built the case were gone before that. Within hours, Blanche's Justice Department released an opinion declaring the law behind those charges unconstitutional. Trump and Blanche had reason to be nervous. Special counsel Jack Smith testified to Congress in January that he had proof beyond a reasonable doubt. Three months later, every person who built that case is gone, and the law it rested on has been erased by the lawyer who fought it. Call your representatives through Resistbot and 5 Calls and demand they block any permanent attorney general nominee who won't commit to enforcing the Presidential Records Act. We've emailed 6,800+ stories over 427 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Today on the Website: https://go.govbrief.today/260402-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-springsteen [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-apr02 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/artemis-leaves-orbit [4] https://go.govbrief.today/drug-tariffs [5] https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-generals [6] https://go.govbrief.today/military-personal-weapons [7] https://go.govbrief.today/pra-unconstitutional [8] https://go.govbrief.today/bondi-fired [9] https://go.govbrief.today/peters-sentence [10] https://go.govbrief.today/states-sued-prediction [11] https://go.govbrief.today/detention-facility-cited [12] https://go.govbrief.today/sarsour-detained [13] https://go.govbrief.today/bortac-violence [14] https://go.govbrief.today/ballroom-ncpc [15] https://go.govbrief.today/senate-house-bill [16] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-drones Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: As a man, yes.
item.description: EDIT: Friday Frontpage! Thank you very much Imgurians! I make reviews as a hobby, and this week I reviewed "Last Action Hero", one of the greatest bombs of the 90's, yet somehow considered one of the best movies of that era! You can watch the review here https://youtu.be/-d0lCYv8zCw
